summary: The IEEPA tariff refund portal goes live today, with CBP launching the CAPE system at 8am ET on April 20, releasing what amounts to a fiscal injection for importers — a structural relief catalyst underpinning broad equity and credit greed. Meanwhile, the Fed holds at 3.50–3.75% as March inflation reaccelerated to 3.3% headline, keeping real rates in a narrow range and capping dollar weakness without reversing it.
tweet: IEEPA refund portal opens today, returning billions to importers as the Fed sits on hold with inflation still running hot at 3.3%.
